scores.correctness_notes: Core pattern is correct: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with combined all_active and all_agents_idle predicates. Additional details about deploy parameters and status inspection are plausible extras.
scores.hallucination_notes: Introduces 'jubilant.any_blocked' and 'jubilant.all_error' predicates not in gold standard (gold standard only mentions 'jubilant.any_error'); 'delay' parameter in wait() and 'app' keyword in deploy() are not verified. These may exist but can't be confirmed from gold standard.
